arts.sum: West Ham boss Graham Potter says he "wasn't in a good place" after he was sacked by Chelsea but that it made him a "stronger person".

arts.ttl: Former Premier League star says Chelsea must sack Enzo Maresca if one thing happens this season, would be ‘a travesty’…
arts.sum: Pressure is beginning to build on Enzo Maresca after what was an excellent start to life as Chelsea manager. The Blues were tipped by many...

arts.ttl: Chelsea Europa Conference League path becomes clearer as Enzo Maresca awaits draw
arts.sum: Following the completion of the league phase, Chelsea discovered their potential last-16 opponents when the draw for the knockout phase play-offs was made in December. Chelsea's route to the Europa Conference League final will be mapped out next Friday when the draw for the round of 16 takes place in Switzerland.

arts.ttl: Jason Cundy and Jamie O'Hara both predict the result for Brighton vs Chelsea in the Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Chelsea travel to Brighton on Friday night in the Premier League for a repeat of last weekend’s FA Cup tie. Chelsea were on the wrong...

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Deivid Washington, free agent update provided by Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca reveals whether Deivid Washington or a free agent are options to replace the injured Nicolas Jackson.

arts.ttl: When is Conference League last-16 draw? Date, start time and TV channel as Chelsea await fate
arts.sum: Blues strongly expected to reach final in Wroclaw

arts.ttl: Graham Potter reveals mental anguish of being Chelsea manager and what he needs for West Ham success
arts.sum: Graham Potter has spoken about the mental health struggles that he endured during his time at Chelsea and how it will make him more successful at West Ham United . Potter was asked what he would say to himself should he revisit the situation, which he thinks ultimately made him better as a person and a manager.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca blasts 'completely wrong' deadline day setup
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca must do without Nicolas Jackson for a number of weeks after he suffered an injury against West Ham on deadline day.

arts.ttl: Renato Veiga: Clear Maresca stance as Juventus make transfer assessment
arts.sum: David Hancko remains Juventus’ main defensive target for next summer, but the Bianconeri are happy...

arts.ttl: 'Amazing': Romeo Lavia claims 'the sky is the limit' for Chelsea teammate he loves playing with
